task_completion.description: Verify that the required employment status types have been created in Sentrifugo.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a Sentrifugo configuration screen (e.g., HR Configuration -> Employment Status) showing 'Part-Time Regular', 'Contract - Fixed Term', 'Seasonal Worker', and 'Intern - Paid' in the list of employment statuses.

task_completion.description: Verify that employees EMP005 and EMP010 have been updated to 'Part-Time Regular'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the Sentrifugo employee list or individual employee profiles for EMP005 and EMP010 showing their employment status as 'Part-Time Regular'.

task_completion.description: Verify that employees EMP008 and EMP019 have been updated to 'Contract - Fixed Term'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the Sentrifugo employee list or individual employee profiles for EMP008 and EMP019 showing their employment status as 'Contract - Fixed Term'.

task_completion.description: Verify that employee EMP014 has been updated to 'Seasonal Worker'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the Sentrifugo employee list or individual employee profile for EMP014 showing their employment status as 'Seasonal Worker'.

task_completion.description: Verify that employee EMP016 has been updated to 'Intern - Paid'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the Sentrifugo employee list or individual employee profile for EMP016 showing their employment status as 'Intern - Paid'.

task_completion.description: Verify that the 'Unpaid Personal Leave' leave type has been created with the correct parameters.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the Sentrifugo Leave configuration screen showing a leave type named 'Unpaid Personal Leave' with the code 'UPL' and an allocation/count of 0 days.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the Sentrifugo web interface to make changes.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the Sentrifugo web application UI being navigated and forms being submitted, rather than terminal commands, API scripts, or direct database modifications.

integrity.description: Verify the employee updates were performed in the actual application.
integrity.visual_evidence: Employee status changes should be visible within the Sentrifugo employee management screens, not just typed into a text editor or the manifest file.

integrity.description: Verify the leave type was created in the Sentrifugo Leave configuration UI.
integrity.visual_evidence: The 'Unpaid Personal Leave' should be visible in the Sentrifugo Leave Types list or creation form, not mocked up in a separate document.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Expected Employment Statuses to be created: 'Part-Time Regular', 'Contract - Fixed Term', 'Seasonal Worker', 'Intern - Paid'. Expected Employee Updates: EMP005 -> Part-Time Regular, EMP008 -> Contract - Fixed Term, EMP010 -> Part-Time Regular, EMP014 -> Seasonal Worker, EMP016 -> Intern - Paid, EMP019 -> Contract - Fixed Term. Expected Leave Type: Name: 'Unpaid Personal Leave', Code: 'UPL', Days: 0.
